pages.raw_text:
The Allied Printing Trades are
trying to have the label placed on
the Mantle park program. The
program Is printed by the keystone
Printing company, and while that
firm Is not on the unfair list of
the printing trades council, it is
not entitled to the Allied Printing
Trades label, as union help is not
employed throughout the plant.


Organized labor in this country
is urging the restriction of immi-
grafton and Senator Patterson Pat
terson of Colorado, who is it's
champion in the senate, defended
the contract labor law. But for
that law, he said, immigrant labor
ers would be brought into the coun-
try to take the places of the strik-
ing coalminers, and expressed APP
prehension that persons allowed to
enter as farm laborers would turn
to other occupations which give
more continuous employment at
better wages. Hence he contended
that the restrictions should not be
removed, but rather that they
should be enforced.
